text.title: Puppeteer Session Management Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply the puppeteer-session-management methodology end-to-end.

step.name: decide-mode
step.action: Pick userdatadir (default) or cookie_serialise (stateless function). Reject hybrid.

step.name: allocate-dirs
step.action: Create one userDataDir per identity under a safe parent (/var/lib/agent/profiles/<id>/). Set 700 perms.

step.name: isolation-strategy
step.action: If parallel: wrap each job in createIncognitoBrowserContext; if not, default context is fine.

step.name: daemonise-if-long
step.action: If >5min, run a daemon exposing HTTP/queue; agent enqueues tasks. Otherwise per-task Bash worker is fine.

step.name: context-cleanup
step.action: Ensure every createIncognitoBrowserContext is paired with context.close() in finally. Log open context count.
